{"step_index":291,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-06-11T17:03:46Z","content":"I have successfully implemented all of your requests! Here is what was done:

1. **QR Code Particulars Setting**: 
   - I updated the **Tag Settings** modal to include a new **QR Code** item under the "Particulars" section. 
   - Just like the other items (Name, Price, Code), you can now toggle the eye icon to show/hide the QR code on the tag.
   - You can also specify the size (width & height in px) for the printed QR code! The master settings will automatically apply this size when generating the tags.

2. **Global Print Engine Integration**:
   - I extracted the print engine logic out of the create item module and placed it into the globally accessible `script.js`.
   - Now, any page with item data can simply invoke `openPrintTagModal()` by passing the specific item data to safely print tags.

3. **Print from View Item**:
   - The "Print Tag" button on the **View Item** page now fully taps into the new global print engine! 
<truncated 420 bytes>"}
